summary: Dashboard replaces the previous control panel and status sections; implementation and tests satisfy acceptance criteria.

requirement_checks.requirement: Dashboard replaces control panel and status sections (heading and table rows present)
evidence: tests/github-messages.test.mjs: 'renderPrBody renders dashboard layout and operator notes' asserts '## Factory Dashboard' and table header rows.
scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: renderPrBody constructs 'dashboardLines' starting with '## Factory Dashboard' and table markup.
scripts/lib/control-panel.mjs: buildDashboard() returns ordered 'rows' for State, Owner, Stage, CI, Repairs, Cost, Estimate, and Next.

requirement_checks.requirement: Open and Actions link grouping (Open and Actions lines render and mutation links marked)
evidence: tests/github-messages.test.mjs: asserts '**Open:**' contains review.md and review.json links and '**Actions:**' contains mutation links with '*(state change)*'.
scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: renderPrBody builds 'openLinks' and 'stateChangeLinks' and appends '*(state change)*' to mutation actions.

requirement_checks.requirement: Artifacts grouped by workflow phase (Plan, Execution, Review) with inline links
evidence: scripts/lib/control-panel.mjs: buildArtifactGroups() creates Plan/Execution/Review groups and filters out missing links.
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: asserts '## Artifacts' contains '**Plan**', '**Execution**', and '**Review**' lines with inline links in expected format.

requirement_checks.requirement: Graceful fallbacks for missing numeric data (Cost, Estimate, Repairs show '—' when missing)
evidence: scripts/lib/control-panel.mjs: formatCostDisplay(), formatEstimateDisplay(), and formatRepairsDisplay() implement fallbacks returning '—'.
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: includes tests that verify CI fallback behavior and other fallback cases.

requirement_checks.requirement: Template override validation respects new tokens and falls back with a warning when required tokens are missing
evidence: scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: MESSAGE_SPECS updated to require 'DASHBOARD_SECTION', 'ARTIFACTS_SECTION', 'OPERATOR_NOTES_SECTION' for 'pr-body'.
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: 'renderPrBody falls back to default template when required tokens are missing' asserts a warning is logged and default is used.

requirement_checks.requirement: Refactor control-panel builder into dashboard data and update renderPrBody to use it
evidence: scripts/lib/control-panel.mjs: new buildDashboard() export implements the dashboard view model.
scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: renderPrBody imports and uses buildDashboard() and emits DASHBOARD_SECTION/ARTIFACTS_SECTION/OPERATOR_NOTES_SECTION variables.

findings.title: Missing optional execution artifact (repair-log.md)
findings.details: The '.factory/runs/84' artifact set does not include 'repair-log.md'. The implementation handles missing artifacts gracefully, but providing a placeholder when execution diagnostics exist keeps artifact lists consistent across runs.
findings.recommendation: Add a lightweight 'repair-log.md' placeholder artifact when execution diagnostics are available or document that its absence is expected in some runs.
